search_document:
User Request: Average order value by month.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Average Order Value by Month
Type: chart
Description: Trend of average order value over the months
Title: Top Customers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: List of customers with the highest total revenue
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue generated

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value by Month
sql_queries.description: Trend of average order value over the months
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, AVG((od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity) * (1 - od.Discount)) AS AverageOrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: List of customers with the highest total revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName, SUM((od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity) * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM((od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity) * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od
